medications.name: Retatrutide
medications.dosing: STK-11: (starter vial); 4 mg; 0.5 ml; 2 ml; 16 mg; STK-13: (titrate vial); 12 mg; 0.5 ml; 2 ml; 48 mg
medications.description: An investigational next-generation metabolic therapy designed to activate three key hormone pathways involved in appetite control, glucose regulation, energy balance, and fat metabolism: GLP-1, GIP, and glucagon. This triple-action mechanism is what makes retatrutide especially exciting compared with earlier incretin therapies. In clinical research, retatrutide has shown substantial weight-loss potential, with higher-dose groups in phase 2 obesity trials averaging up to 24.2% body-weight reduction over 48 weeks. Its broader metabolic signaling may also support meaningful fat-mass reduction while helping clients pursue a more complete body-composition strategy when paired with adequate protein intake, resistance training, and clinician-guided monitoring.
medications.indication: May fit clients seeking advanced metabolic and weight-management support when appetite, cravings, insulin resistance, or body-composition goals have not responded adequately to lifestyle changes or prior GLP-1/GIP therapies. Retatrutide may be especially relevant for clients focused not only on scale weight, but also on improving fat loss while protecting strength, lean tissue, and long-term metabolic health through a structured plan that includes nutrition, resistance training, and follow-up monitoring.

medications.indication: May fit clients with poor sleep, cycle-related symptoms, irritability, perimenopause/menopause patterns, or low-progesterone findings after history, goals, and monitoring needs are reviewed.

peptides.indication: May fit carefully screened clients with body-composition or recovery goals when IGF-1, glucose markers, cancer history, and route-specific monitoring are reviewed.

tests.name: Men's Comprehensive Hormone Panel
tests.description: An advanced panel assessing a wide range of male hormones and biomarkers, ensuring peak performance, recovery, and metabolic balance.
tests.indication: Includes Total & Free Testosterone (LC/MS), Estradiol, SHBG, Prolactin, Cortisol, Progesterone, LH, FSH, DHEA-S, PSA, TSH, Free T3, Free T4, IGF-1, Lipid Panel, ApoB, Lipoprotein (a), Ferritin, HbA1c, CBC, Metabolic Panel, Fasting Insulin, GGT, Vitamin D, Iron Panel, and hsCRP.

medications.name: Modafinil Tablet
medications.description: A wakefulness-promoting medication used to improve alertness when a clinician determines it is appropriate.
medications.indication: May fit clients with excessive daytime sleepiness, shift-work related sleepiness, or significant fatigue after review of sleep quality, cardiovascular risk, psychiatric history, and medication interactions.

medications.name: Testosterone Cypionate in GSO
medications.dosing: EMP-321: 20 mg/ml; 5 ml; EMP-375: 50 mg/ml; 5 ml
medications.description: An injectable testosterone option used in clinician-guided hormone care to support testosterone levels when symptoms and lab results indicate a need for treatment.
medications.indication: May fit clients with low-testosterone patterns such as low libido, low motivation, fatigue, mood changes, reduced training response, or poor recovery, with individualized dosing and ongoing lab monitoring.

medications.name: Retatrutide
medications.dosing: STK-11: (starter vial); 4 mg; 0.5 ml; 2 ml; 16 mg; STK-13: (titrate vial); 12 mg; 0.5 ml; 2 ml; 48 mg
medications.description: An investigational next-generation metabolic therapy designed to activate three key hormone pathways involved in appetite control, glucose regulation, energy balance, and fat metabolism: GLP-1, GIP, and glucagon. This triple-action mechanism is what makes retatrutide especially exciting compared with earlier incretin therapies. In clinical research, retatrutide has shown substantial weight-loss potential, with higher-dose groups in phase 2 obesity trials averaging up to 24.2% body-weight reduction over 48 weeks. Its broader metabolic signaling may also support meaningful fat-mass reduction while helping clients pursue a more complete body-composition strategy when paired with adequate protein intake, resistance training, and clinician-guided monitoring.
medications.indication: May fit clients seeking advanced metabolic and weight-management support when appetite, cravings, insulin resistance, or body-composition goals have not responded adequately to lifestyle changes or prior GLP-1/GIP therapies. Retatrutide may be especially relevant for clients focused not only on scale weight, but also on improving fat loss while protecting strength, lean tissue, and long-term metabolic health through a structured plan that includes nutrition, resistance training, and follow-up monitoring.

peptides.name: HCG Injection (Pregnyl®)
peptides.description: A hormone-signaling medication that mimics luteinizing-hormone activity and may support ovarian or testicular hormone production in fertility-conscious or endocrine protocols.
peptides.indication: May fit clients who need support for natural hormone signaling, fertility-related goals, or gonadal function while a clinician reviews anatomy-specific use, labs, dosing, and follow-up monitoring.

peptides.name: Glutathione Injection (Preserved)
peptides.description: A glutathione support therapy used to reinforce antioxidant capacity, oxidative-stress resilience, and detoxification-related pathways.
peptides.indication: May fit clients with recovery demands, oxidative-stress concerns, detoxification-support goals, or high training load when route, sensitivity, and overall care context are reviewed.

medications.name: Retatrutide
medications.dosing: STK-11: (starter vial); 4 mg; 0.5 ml; 2 ml; 16 mg; STK-13: (titrate vial); 12 mg; 0.5 ml; 2 ml; 48 mg
medications.description: An investigational next-generation metabolic therapy designed to activate three key hormone pathways involved in appetite control, glucose regulation, energy balance, and fat metabolism: GLP-1, GIP, and glucagon. This triple-action mechanism is what makes retatrutide especially exciting compared with earlier incretin therapies. In clinical research, retatrutide has shown substantial weight-loss potential, with higher-dose groups in phase 2 obesity trials averaging up to 24.2% body-weight reduction over 48 weeks. Its broader metabolic signaling may also support meaningful fat-mass reduction while helping clients pursue a more complete body-composition strategy when paired with adequate protein intake, resistance training, and clinician-guided monitoring.
medications.indication: May fit clients seeking advanced metabolic and weight-management support when appetite, cravings, insulin resistance, or body-composition goals have not responded adequately to lifestyle changes or prior GLP-1/GIP therapies. Retatrutide may be especially relevant for clients focused not only on scale weight, but also on improving fat loss while protecting strength, lean tissue, and long-term metabolic health through a structured plan that includes nutrition, resistance training, and follow-up monitoring.

tests.name: DUTCH Complete™ Test
tests.description: The DUTCH Complete™ Test (Dried Urine Test for Comprehensive Hormones) is an advanced hormone panel that provides a detailed analysis of sex hormones, adrenal function, and their metabolites. Using dried urine samples collected over a 24-hour period, this test offers a comprehensive assessment of hormonal balance, metabolism, and overall endocrine health. It measures cortisol patterns, sex hormones, melatonin, and organic acid markers to provide insights into stress response, hormone detoxification, and overall well-being.
tests.indication: The DUTCH Complete™ Test is indicated for individuals experiencing symptoms related to hormone imbalance, adrenal dysfunction, and metabolic concerns, including fatigue, mood swings, weight fluctuations, irregular menstrual cycles, low libido, and sleep disturbances. It is particularly beneficial for assessing adrenal health, evaluating estrogen metabolism, and monitoring hormone therapy. This test provides actionable insights for optimizing hormonal balance, improving stress resilience, and enhancing overall wellness.

medications.dosing: STK-9: (Starter VIal); 7.5 mg; 1 mg; 0.5 mL; 2 ml; STK-10: (titrate vial); 15 mg; 1 mg; 0.5 mL; 2 ml
medications.description: A dual incretin-based metabolic therapy with added nutrient support used in clinician-guided weight-management and metabolic-health programs to support satiety, appetite regulation, and glucose response.
medications.indication: May fit clients with weight-loss resistance, strong appetite signaling, cravings, blood-sugar swings, or insulin-resistance patterns after review of contraindications, dose titration, and GI tolerability.

medications.name: Retatrutide
medications.dosing: STK-11: (starter vial); 4 mg; 0.5 ml; 2 ml; 16 mg; STK-13: (titrate vial); 12 mg; 0.5 ml; 2 ml; 48 mg
medications.description: An investigational next-generation metabolic therapy designed to activate three key hormone pathways involved in appetite control, glucose regulation, energy balance, and fat metabolism: GLP-1, GIP, and glucagon. This triple-action mechanism is what makes retatrutide especially exciting compared with earlier incretin therapies. In clinical research, retatrutide has shown substantial weight-loss potential, with higher-dose groups in phase 2 obesity trials averaging up to 24.2% body-weight reduction over 48 weeks. Its broader metabolic signaling may also support meaningful fat-mass reduction while helping clients pursue a more complete body-composition strategy when paired with adequate protein intake, resistance training, and clinician-guided monitoring.
medications.indication: May fit clients seeking advanced metabolic and weight-management support when appetite, cravings, insulin resistance, or body-composition goals have not responded adequately to lifestyle changes or prior GLP-1/GIP therapies. Retatrutide may be especially relevant for clients focused not only on scale weight, but also on improving fat loss while protecting strength, lean tissue, and long-term metabolic health through a structured plan that includes nutrition, resistance training, and follow-up monitoring.

promos.name: Tight-Tone-Tan Promotion
promos.description: Our Tight • Toned • Tan promotional package combines three advanced therapies designed to support body composition, skin quality, recovery, and overall appearance from the inside out.
promos.indication: This protocol includes: Retatrutide, 5-Amina-1MQ,and GHK-CU. Retatrutide is a peptide therapy designed to support weight management and metabolic health by regulating appetite, blood sugar, and energy expenditure. As a “triple agonist,” it activates GLP-1, GIP, and glucagon receptors, offering a more comprehensive approach than traditional weight-loss therapies. It may also help preserve lean muscle mass when combined with adequate protein intake and resistance training. 5-Amino-1MQ is a peptide compound being studied for its ability to support fat metabolism, energy production, and body recomposition by inhibiting the NNMT enzyme, which is linked to fat storage and metabolic efficiency. It may help promote a leaner body composition, reduce stubborn fat, improve muscle definition, and support energy levels, making it a common addition to weight management and metabolic optimization protocols. GHK-Cu is a naturally occurring copper peptide studied for its regenerative, skin, and hair-supportive properties. It may support collagen production, tissue repair, skin firmness and texture, wound healing, antioxidant activity, and overall skin and scalp health.

tests.name: DUTCH Complete™ Test
tests.description: The DUTCH Complete™ Test (Dried Urine Test for Comprehensive Hormones) is an advanced hormone panel that provides a detailed analysis of sex hormones, adrenal function, and their metabolites. Using dried urine samples collected over a 24-hour period, this test offers a comprehensive assessment of hormonal balance, metabolism, and overall endocrine health. It measures cortisol patterns, sex hormones, melatonin, and organic acid markers to provide insights into stress response, hormone detoxification, and overall well-being.
tests.indication: The DUTCH Complete™ Test is indicated for individuals experiencing symptoms related to hormone imbalance, adrenal dysfunction, and metabolic concerns, including fatigue, mood swings, weight fluctuations, irregular menstrual cycles, low libido, and sleep disturbances. It is particularly beneficial for assessing adrenal health, evaluating estrogen metabolism, and monitoring hormone therapy. This test provides actionable insights for optimizing hormonal balance, improving stress resilience, and enhancing overall wellness.

tests.name: The DUTCH CAR Testing
tests.description: The DUTCH CAR (Cortisol Awakening Response) Test is a saliva-based assessment designed to evaluate cortisol patterns and the body’s stress response throughout the morning awakening period. This test provides insight into HPA-axis function, adrenal regulation, and how stress hormones may be affecting sleep, energy, mood, and recovery. Abnormal cortisol rhythms can contribute to nighttime waking, early morning awakenings, fatigue, and difficulty returning to sleep.
tests.indication: The DUTCH CAR Test is recommended for individuals experiencing disrupted sleep patterns, particularly early morning awakenings around 2–4 AM, difficulty falling back asleep, chronic stress, fatigue, anxiety, or burnout symptoms. supplements.name: Green Tea
supplements.description: Green tea extract is a concentrated source of antioxidants, particularly catechins like EGCG, derived from the leaves of the Camellia sinensis plant. These compounds help reduce oxidative stress, support metabolic health, and promote overall cellular function. In addition to its antioxidant benefits, green tea extract contains a natural combination of caffeine and L-theanine, which work synergistically to improve alertness and mental clarity without the typical jitters or crashes associated with stimulants.
supplements.indication: Recommended for individuals looking to support healthy weight management, improve focus and energy, and promote cardiovascular and metabolic health. medications.name: Testosterone Cypionate in GSO

medications.name: Retatrutide
medications.dosing: STK-11: (starter vial); 4 mg; 0.5 ml; 2 ml; 16 mg; STK-13: (titrate vial); 12 mg; 0.5 ml; 2 ml; 48 mg
medications.description: An investigational next-generation metabolic therapy designed to activate three key hormone pathways involved in appetite control, glucose regulation, energy balance, and fat metabolism: GLP-1, GIP, and glucagon. This triple-action mechanism is what makes retatrutide especially exciting compared with earlier incretin therapies. In clinical research, retatrutide has shown substantial weight-loss potential, with higher-dose groups in phase 2 obesity trials averaging up to 24.2% body-weight reduction over 48 weeks. Its broader metabolic signaling may also support meaningful fat-mass reduction while helping clients pursue a more complete body-composition strategy when paired with adequate protein intake, resistance training, and clinician-guided monitoring.
medications.indication: May fit clients seeking advanced metabolic and weight-management support when appetite, cravings, insulin resistance, or body-composition goals have not responded adequately to lifestyle changes or prior GLP-1/GIP therapies. Retatrutide may be especially relevant for clients focused not only on scale weight, but also on improving fat loss while protecting strength, lean tissue, and long-term metabolic health through a structured plan that includes nutrition, resistance training, and follow-up monitoring.

peptides.indication: May fit carefully screened clients with tendon, ligament, joint, training-recovery, or soft-tissue goals when expectations, regulatory status, and clinician monitoring are reviewed.

It may help promote a leaner body composition, reduce stubborn fat, improve muscle definition, and support energy levels, making it a common addition to weight management and metabolic optimization protocols.
peptides.indication: May may be used to support fat loss, metabolic function, energy production, body recomposition, and lean muscle definition, particularly in individuals seeking additional support with weight management or reduction of stubborn fat areas.

promos.name: Tight-Tone-Tan Promotion

promos.indication: This protocol includes: Retatrutide, 5-Amina-1MQ,and GHK-CU. Retatrutide is a peptide therapy designed to support weight management and metabolic health by regulating appetite, blood sugar, and energy expenditure. As a “triple agonist,” it activates GLP-1, GIP, and glucagon receptors, offering a more comprehensive approach than traditional weight-loss therapies. It may also help preserve lean muscle mass when combined with adequate protein intake and resistance training. 5-Amino-1MQ is a peptide compound being studied for its ability to support fat metabolism, energy production, and body recomposition by inhibiting the NNMT enzyme, which is linked to fat storage and metabolic efficiency. It may help promote a leaner body composition, reduce stubborn fat, improve muscle definition, and support energy levels, making it a common addition to weight management and metabolic optimization protocols. GHK-Cu is a naturally occurring copper peptide studied for its regenerative, skin, and hair-supportive properties. It may support collagen production, tissue repair, skin firmness and texture, wound healing, antioxidant activity, and overall skin and scalp health.

promos.name: Tight-Tone-Tan Promotion
promos.description: Our Tight • Toned • Tan promotional package combines three advanced therapies designed to support body composition, skin quality, recovery, and overall appearance from the inside out.
promos.indication: This protocol includes: Retatrutide, 5-Amina-1MQ,and GHK-CU. Retatrutide is a peptide therapy designed to support weight management and metabolic health by regulating appetite, blood sugar, and energy expenditure. As a “triple agonist,” it activates GLP-1, GIP, and glucagon receptors, offering a more comprehensive approach than traditional weight-loss therapies. It may also help preserve lean muscle mass when combined with adequate protein intake and resistance training. 5-Amino-1MQ is a peptide compound being studied for its ability to support fat metabolism, energy production, and body recomposition by inhibiting the NNMT enzyme, which is linked to fat storage and metabolic efficiency. It may help promote a leaner body composition, reduce stubborn fat, improve muscle definition, and support energy levels, making it a common addition to weight management and metabolic optimization protocols. GHK-Cu is a naturally occurring copper peptide studied for its regenerative, skin, and hair-supportive properties. It may support collagen production, tissue repair, skin firmness and texture, wound healing, antioxidant activity, and overall skin and scalp health.

medications.name: Retatrutide
medications.dosing: STK-11: (starter vial); 4 mg; 0.5 ml; 2 ml; 16 mg; STK-13: (titrate vial); 12 mg; 0.5 ml; 2 ml; 48 mg
medications.description: An investigational next-generation metabolic therapy designed to activate three key hormone pathways involved in appetite control, glucose regulation, energy balance, and fat metabolism: GLP-1, GIP, and glucagon. This triple-action mechanism is what makes retatrutide especially exciting compared with earlier incretin therapies. In clinical research, retatrutide has shown substantial weight-loss potential, with higher-dose groups in phase 2 obesity trials averaging up to 24.2% body-weight reduction over 48 weeks. supplements.description: Promotes optimal glutathione status, a potent antioxidant.*

promos.name: Tight-Tone-Tan Promotion
promos.description: Our Tight • Toned • Tan promotional package combines three advanced therapies designed to support body composition, skin quality, recovery, and overall appearance from the inside out.
promos.indication: This protocol includes: Retatrutide, 5-Amina-1MQ,and GHK-CU. Retatrutide is a peptide therapy designed to support weight management and metabolic health by regulating appetite, blood sugar, and energy expenditure. As a “triple agonist,” it activates GLP-1, GIP, and glucagon receptors, offering a more comprehensive approach than traditional weight-loss therapies. It may also help preserve lean muscle mass when combined with adequate protein intake and resistance training. 5-Amino-1MQ is a peptide compound being studied for its ability to support fat metabolism, energy production, and body recomposition by inhibiting the NNMT enzyme, which is linked to fat storage and metabolic efficiency. It may help promote a leaner body composition, reduce stubborn fat, improve muscle definition, and support energy levels, making it a common addition to weight management and metabolic optimization protocols. GHK-Cu is a naturally occurring copper peptide studied for its regenerative, skin, and hair-supportive properties. It may support collagen production, tissue repair, skin firmness and texture, wound healing, antioxidant activity, and overall skin and scalp health.

medications.dosing: STK-11: (starter vial); 4 mg; 0.5 ml; 2 ml; 16 mg; STK-13: (titrate vial); 12 mg; 0.5 ml; 2 ml; 48 mg
medications.description: An investigational next-generation metabolic therapy designed to activate three key hormone pathways involved in appetite control, glucose regulation, energy balance, and fat metabolism: GLP-1, GIP, and glucagon. This triple-action mechanism is what makes retatrutide especially exciting compared with earlier incretin therapies. In clinical research, retatrutide has shown substantial weight-loss potential, with higher-dose groups in phase 2 obesity trials averaging up to 24.2% body-weight reduction over 48 weeks. Its broader metabolic signaling may also support meaningful fat-mass reduction while helping clients pursue a more complete body-composition strategy when paired with adequate protein intake, resistance training, and clinician-guided monitoring.
medications.indication: May fit clients seeking advanced metabolic and weight-management support when appetite, cravings, insulin resistance, or body-composition goals have not responded adequately to lifestyle changes or prior GLP-1/GIP therapies. Retatrutide may be especially relevant for clients focused not only on scale weight, but also on improving fat loss while protecting strength, lean tissue, and long-term metabolic health through a structured plan that includes nutrition, resistance training, and follow-up monitoring.

promos.name: Tight-Tone-Tan Promotion
promos.description: Our Tight • Toned • Tan promotional package combines three advanced therapies designed to support body composition, skin quality, recovery, and overall appearance from the inside out.
promos.indication: This protocol includes: Retatrutide, 5-Amina-1MQ,and GHK-CU. Retatrutide is a peptide therapy designed to support weight management and metabolic health by regulating appetite, blood sugar, and energy expenditure. As a “triple agonist,” it activates GLP-1, GIP, and glucagon receptors, offering a more comprehensive approach than traditional weight-loss therapies. It may also help preserve lean muscle mass when combined with adequate protein intake and resistance training. 5-Amino-1MQ is a peptide compound being studied for its ability to support fat metabolism, energy production, and body recomposition by inhibiting the NNMT enzyme, which is linked to fat storage and metabolic efficiency. It may help promote a leaner body composition, reduce stubborn fat, improve muscle definition, and support energy levels, making it a common addition to weight management and metabolic optimization protocols. GHK-Cu is a naturally occurring copper peptide studied for its regenerative, skin, and hair-supportive properties. It may support collagen production, tissue repair, skin firmness and texture, wound healing, antioxidant activity, and overall skin and scalp health.

medications.name: Testosterone Cypionate Injection (Grapeseed Oil)
medications.dosing: EMP-2: 200 mg/ml; 10 ml; EMP-4: 150 mg/ml; 5 ml; EMP-171: 200 mg/ml; 5 ml

medications.name: Retatrutide
medications.dosing: STK-11: (starter vial); 4 mg; 0.5 ml; 2 ml; 16 mg; STK-13: (titrate vial); 12 mg; 0.5 ml; 2 ml; 48 mg
medications.description: An investigational next-generation metabolic therapy designed to activate three key hormone pathways involved in appetite control, glucose regulation, energy balance, and fat metabolism: GLP-1, GIP, and glucagon. This triple-action mechanism is what makes retatrutide especially exciting compared with earlier incretin therapies. In clinical research, retatrutide has shown substantial weight-loss potential, with higher-dose groups in phase 2 obesity trials averaging up to 24.2% body-weight reduction over 48 weeks. Its broader metabolic signaling may also support meaningful fat-mass reduction while helping clients pursue a more complete body-composition strategy when paired with adequate protein intake, resistance training, and clinician-guided monitoring.
medications.indication: May fit clients seeking advanced metabolic and weight-management support when appetite, cravings, insulin resistance, or body-composition goals have not responded adequately to lifestyle changes or prior GLP-1/GIP therapies. Retatrutide may be especially relevant for clients focused not only on scale weight, but also on improving fat loss while protecting strength, lean tissue, and long-term metabolic health through a structured plan that includes nutrition, resistance training, and follow-up monitoring.

supplements.name: Green Tea
supplements.description: Green tea extract is a concentrated source of antioxidants, particularly catechins like EGCG, derived from the leaves of the Camellia sinensis plant. These compounds help reduce oxidative stress, support metabolic health, and promote overall cellular function. In addition to its antioxidant benefits, green tea extract contains a natural combination of caffeine and L-theanine, which work synergistically to improve alertness and mental clarity without the typical jitters or crashes associated with stimulants.
supplements.indication: Recommended for individuals looking to support healthy weight management, improve focus and energy, and promote cardiovascular and metabolic health. Its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties also make it beneficial for those seeking additional protection against the effects of chronic stress and aging.

supplements.name: Health Essential Bundle (Multi, Vitamin D, Omega)

supplements.name: L-Theanine
supplements.description: L-Theanine is a naturally occurring amino acid found in green and black tea leaves. It promotes relaxation without causing drowsiness, making it ideal for stress relief and mental focus. Known for its calming effects, it may also enhance cognitive performance, reduce anxiety, and improve sleep quality.
supplements.indication: Recommended for individuals seeking to reduce stress, enhance focus, or improve sleep patterns. It is particularly useful for managing everyday anxiety and promoting a sense of calm while maintaining alertness.

supplements.name: Myo-Inositol + D-Chiro Inositol
supplements.description: Myo-inositol and D-chiro inositol are naturally occurring compounds that function as insulin-signaling molecules within the body. Commonly used to support healthy blood sugar regulation, improve cellular insulin sensitivity, optimize ovarian function, and promote hormonal balance. This combination may also help reduce cravings, support healthy body composition, improve metabolic efficiency, and enhance overall reproductive and endocrine health.
supplements.indication: Recommended due to evidence of insulin resistance, difficulty with weight loss, sweet cravings, low-normal SHBG, facial hair growth, history of ovarian cysts, and symptoms consistent with a PCOS-spectrum metabolic pattern. Myo-inositol and D-chiro inositol may help improve insulin sensitivity, support more balanced androgen and estrogen signaling, promote healthy ovulation and progesterone production, and assist with long-term metabolic and hormonal optimization.

supplements.description: Kyolic Aged Garlic Extract Formula 104 supports cardiovascular health by helping to maintain healthy cholesterol levels and overall heart function. supplements.indication: Supports healthy cholesterol levels and promotes overall heart health with the power of aged garlic extract and lecithin.

supplements.name: Green Tea
supplements.description: Green tea extract is a concentrated source of antioxidants, particularly catechins like EGCG, derived from the leaves of the Camellia sinensis plant. These compounds help reduce oxidative stress, support metabolic health, and promote overall cellular function. In addition to its antioxidant benefits, green tea extract contains a natural combination of caffeine and L-theanine, which work synergistically to improve alertness and mental clarity without the typical jitters or crashes associated with stimulants.
supplements.indication: Recommended for individuals looking to support healthy weight management, improve focus and energy, and promote cardiovascular and metabolic health. Its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties also make it beneficial for those seeking additional protection against the effects of chronic stress and aging.

medications.description: A hormone-precursor combination used to support adrenal-androgen pathways, neurosteroid balance, stress resilience, and downstream hormone production when levels are low or suboptimal.

tests.name: Men's TRT Treatment Follow-Up Panel
tests.description: A targeted follow-up panel designed for men undergoing hormone therapy, tracking key changes in testosterone and overall health.
tests.indication: Measures Free & Total Testosterone, Estradiol, PSA, CBC, and Metabolic Panel.

medications.name: Testosterone Cypionate Injection (Grapeseed Oil)
medications.dosing: EMP-2: 200 mg/ml; 10 ml; EMP-4: 150 mg/ml; 5 ml; EMP-171: 200 mg/ml; 5 ml
medications.description: An injectable testosterone option used in clinician-guided hormone care to support testosterone levels when symptoms and lab results indicate a need for treatment.
medications.indication: May fit clients with low-testosterone patterns such as low libido, low motivation, fatigue, mood changes, reduced training response, or poor recovery, with individualized dosing and ongoing lab monitoring.

medications.name: Ezetimibe Tablet
medications.description: A cholesterol medication that reduces intestinal cholesterol absorption to support lower LDL cholesterol as part of a broader cardiometabolic plan.
medications.indication: May fit clients with elevated LDL cholesterol or cardiovascular-risk markers who need additional lipid support alongside nutrition, lifestyle, and follow-up lab monitoring.

medications.name: Retatrutide
medications.dosing: STK-11: (starter vial); 4 mg; 0.5 ml; 2 ml; 16 mg; STK-13: (titrate vial); 12 mg; 0.5 ml; 2 ml; 48 mg
medications.description: An investigational next-generation metabolic therapy designed to activate three key hormone pathways involved in appetite control, glucose regulation, energy balance, and fat metabolism: GLP-1, GIP, and glucagon. This triple-action mechanism is what makes retatrutide especially exciting compared with earlier incretin therapies. In clinical research, retatrutide has shown substantial weight-loss potential, with higher-dose groups in phase 2 obesity trials averaging up to 24.2% body-weight reduction over 48 weeks. Its broader metabolic signaling may also support meaningful fat-mass reduction while helping clients pursue a more complete body-composition strategy when paired with adequate protein intake, resistance training, and clinician-guided monitoring.
medications.indication: May fit clients seeking advanced metabolic and weight-management support when appetite, cravings, insulin resistance, or body-composition goals have not responded adequately to lifestyle changes or prior GLP-1/GIP therapies. Retatrutide may be especially relevant for clients focused not only on scale weight, but also on improving fat loss while protecting strength, lean tissue, and long-term metabolic health through a structured plan that includes nutrition, resistance training, and follow-up monitoring.

medications.name: Enclomiphene
medications.description: A selective estrogen receptor modulator used to encourage the body’s own upstream testosterone signaling rather than replacing testosterone directly.
medications.indication: May fit clients seeking testosterone support while preserving natural gonadal signaling or fertility-related pathways, with monitoring of testosterone, estradiol, symptoms, and visual or mood side effects.

peptides.name: Glutathione Injection (Preserved)
peptides.description: A glutathione support therapy used to reinforce antioxidant capacity, oxidative-stress resilience, and detoxification-related pathways.
peptides.indication: May fit clients with recovery demands, oxidative-stress concerns, detoxification-support goals, or high training load when route, sensitivity, and overall care context are reviewed.

peptides.name: GLOW GHK-Cu/BPC-157/TB-500 Injection (//)
peptides.description: A research-informed recovery peptide combination pairing BPC-157 with thymosin beta-4/TB-500 pathways to support tissue remodeling, mobility, and repair signaling.
peptides.indication: May fit carefully screened clients with tendon, ligament, joint, training-recovery, or soft-tissue goals when expectations, regulatory status, and clinician monitoring are reviewed.

peptides.name: Tesamorelin/Injection
peptides.dosing: VPI-39: (T1); 2500 mcg/mL; 10 ml; VPI-41: (T1); 2500 mcg/mL; 5 ml
peptides.description: A GHRH analog peptide used in select protocols to support growth-hormone/IGF-1 signaling and body-composition goals.
peptides.indication: May fit carefully screened clients with body-composition or recovery goals when IGF-1, glucose markers, cancer history, and route-specific monitoring are reviewed.

peptides.name: 5-Amino-1-Methylquinolinium Chloride Capsule
peptides.description: 5-Amino-1MQ is a peptide compound being studied for its ability to support fat metabolism, energy production, and body recomposition by inhibiting the NNMT enzyme, which is linked to fat storage and metabolic efficiency. It may help promote a leaner body composition, reduce stubborn fat, improve muscle definition, and support energy levels, making it a common addition to weight management and metabolic optimization protocols.
peptides.indication: May may be used to support fat loss, metabolic function, energy production, body recomposition, and lean muscle definition, particularly in individuals seeking additional support with weight management or reduction of stubborn fat areas.

supplements.name: CoQ10 (Coenzyme Q10)
supplements.description: CoQ10 is a naturally occurring antioxidant found in every cell of the body and is essential for mitochondrial energy production. It plays a critical role in generating ATP, the body's primary energy currency, while also protecting cells from oxidative stress. CoQ10 levels naturally decline with age and may be further reduced by statin medications.
supplements.indication: CoQ10 is recommended to support cardiovascular health, mitochondrial function, cellular energy production, and healthy aging. It may be particularly beneficial for individuals taking statin medications, experiencing fatigue, seeking exercise recovery support, or looking to optimize heart and metabolic health.

supplements.name: Urolithin A
supplements.description: Urolithin A is a postbiotic compound produced when gut bacteria metabolize polyphenols found in foods such as pomegranates, berries, and walnuts. It has been studied for its ability to stimulate mitophagy, the body's natural process of removing damaged mitochondria and promoting the regeneration of healthier, more efficient cellular energy-producing structures.
supplements.indication: Urolithin A may be utilized to support healthy aging, muscle strength, endurance, mitochondrial function, and cellular repair. It is often considered for individuals focused on longevity, preserving muscle mass during weight loss, improving exercise performance, and supporting overall vitality as they age.

supplements.name: Glycine
supplements.description: Glycine is a conditionally essential amino acid involved in numerous physiological processes, including neurotransmitter balance, collagen production, detoxification, glutathione synthesis, and sleep regulation. It functions as a calming neurotransmitter within the central nervous system and supports recovery, tissue repair, and metabolic health.
supplements.indication: Glycine may be recommended to support healthy sleep quality, relaxation, recovery, cognitive function, and antioxidant production. It can be particularly useful for individuals experiencing difficulty maintaining sleep, elevated stress levels, poor recovery, or those seeking support for healthy aging and metabolic function.

supplements.name: Alpha-Lipoic Acid (ALA)
supplements.description: Alpha-lipoic acid is a powerful antioxidant that is both water- and fat-soluble, allowing it to provide broad cellular protection throughout the body. It plays an important role in mitochondrial energy metabolism and helps regenerate other antioxidants such as vitamins C and E, glutathione, and CoQ10. ALA has also been extensively studied for its effects on nerve health and glucose metabolism.
supplements.indication: Alpha-lipoic acid may be beneficial for supporting healthy blood sugar regulation, nerve function, mitochondrial health, and antioxidant defenses. It is commonly considered for individuals with insulin resistance, prediabetes, peripheral neuropathy symptoms such as burning or tingling sensations, and those seeking additional support for healthy aging and metabolic optimization.

supplements.name: Creatine
supplements.description: A naturally occurring compound stored in muscles and used to produce energy during high-intensity activities.
supplements.indication: Fuel your body and mind with Creatine. By enhancing energy production, Creatine helps maintain muscle mass during aging or recovery while also improving memory, focus, and mental clarity.

supplements.name: GLP-1 Agonist Side Effect Support Bundle
supplements.description: A combination of supplements designed to alleviate common side effects of GLP-1 receptor agonist therapies.
supplements.indication: GLP-1 therapy side effects with our GLP-1 Agonist Side Effect Support Bundle.

supplements.name: Health Essential Bundle (Multi, Vitamin D, Omega)
supplements.description: Support your health with this essential trio: Vitamin D3 + K2 for strong bones, immunity, and mood balance, a high-quality multivitamin to fill nutritional gaps, and Omega-3s for heart, brain, and anti-inflammatory support. Optimize your wellness with these foundational nutrients!
supplements.indication: Designed to support bone strength, immune function, heart health, and overall vitality.

supplements.name: L-Theanine
supplements.description: L-Theanine is a naturally occurring amino acid found in green and black tea leaves. It promotes relaxation without causing drowsiness, making it ideal for stress relief and mental focus. Known for its calming effects, it may also enhance cognitive performance, reduce anxiety, and improve sleep quality.
supplements.indication: Recommended for individuals seeking to reduce stress, enhance focus, or improve sleep patterns. It is particularly useful for managing everyday anxiety and promoting a sense of calm while maintaining alertness.

supplements.name: Boron

It also influences steroid hormone activity by affecting the metabolism and availability of testosterone and estrogen, and it has mild anti-inflammatory and brain-supportive effects.
supplements.indication: Boron is commonly used to support healthy bone density, joint health, and hormonal balance, particularly in individuals with age-related declines in sex hormones or elevated SHBG. It may also be helpful for optimizing free testosterone levels, improving nutrient utilization (especially vitamin D and magnesium), and supporting cognitive and inflammatory balance in overall healthy aging protocols.

It is often considered for individuals focused on longevity, preserving muscle mass during weight loss, improving exercise performance, and supporting overall vitality as they age.

supplements.name: Glycine
supplements.description: Glycine is a conditionally essential amino acid involved in numerous physiological processes, including neurotransmitter balance, collagen production, detoxification, glutathione synthesis, and sleep regulation. It functions as a calming neurotransmitter within the central nervous system and supports recovery, tissue repair, and metabolic health.
supplements.indication: Glycine may be recommended to support healthy sleep quality, relaxation, recovery, cognitive function, and antioxidant production. It can be particularly useful for individuals experiencing difficulty maintaining sleep, elevated stress levels, poor recovery, or those seeking support for healthy aging and metabolic function.

supplements.name: Alpha-Lipoic Acid (ALA)
supplements.description: Alpha-lipoic acid is a powerful antioxidant that is both water- and fat-soluble, allowing it to provide broad cellular protection throughout the body. It plays an important role in mitochondrial energy metabolism and helps regenerate other antioxidants such as vitamins C and E, glutathione, and CoQ10. ALA has also been extensively studied for its effects on nerve health and glucose metabolism.
supplements.indication: Alpha-lipoic acid may be beneficial for supporting healthy blood sugar regulation, nerve function, mitochondrial health, and antioxidant defenses. It is commonly considered for individuals with insulin resistance, prediabetes, peripheral neuropathy symptoms such as burning or tingling sensations, and those seeking additional support for healthy aging and metabolic optimization.

supplements.name: Boron
supplements.description: Boron is a trace mineral that plays an important role in bone metabolism, hormone regulation, and the utilization of key nutrients such as calcium, magnesium, and vitamin D. It also influences steroid hormone activity by affecting the metabolism and availability of testosterone and estrogen, and it has mild anti-inflammatory and brain-supportive effects.
supplements.indication: Boron is commonly used to support healthy bone density, joint health, and hormonal balance, particularly in individuals with age-related declines in sex hormones or elevated SHBG. It may also be helpful for optimizing free testosterone levels, improving nutrient utilization (especially vitamin D and magnesium), and supporting cognitive and inflammatory balance in overall healthy aging protocols.

supplements.name: CoQ10 (Coenzyme Q10)
supplements.description: CoQ10 is a naturally occurring antioxidant found in every cell of the body and is essential for mitochondrial energy production. supplements.indication: CoQ10 is recommended to support cardiovascular health, mitochondrial function, cellular energy production, and healthy aging. It may be particularly beneficial for individuals taking statin medications, experiencing fatigue, seeking exercise recovery support, or looking to optimize heart and metabolic health.

supplements.name: Methylated B-Complex
supplements.description: Methylated B-Complex is a bioavailable blend of essential B vitamins, including methylfolate (B9) and methylcobalamin (B12), which are provided in their active forms for improved absorption and utilization. These vitamins play a critical role in cellular energy production, methylation pathways, nervous system function, detoxification, neurotransmitter synthesis, and cardiovascular health. Methylated forms may be particularly beneficial for individuals with genetic variations that can impair conversion of standard B vitamins into their active forms.
supplements.indication: Recommended to support energy production, mental clarity, stress resilience, hormone metabolism, and healthy methylation pathways. May be beneficial for patients with fatigue, low-normal B12 or folate levels, poor concentration, elevated inflammation, hormone imbalances, or symptoms of metabolic dysfunction. In this patient, methylated B-complex may help support cellular energy, adrenal function, detoxification processes, and overall metabolic health while addressing suboptimal B-vitamin status identified on laboratory testing.

supplements.name: Boron
supplements.description: Boron is a trace mineral that supports hormone metabolism, bone health, cognitive function, vitamin D utilization, and healthy inflammatory responses. Research suggests boron may help reduce sex hormone binding globulin (SHBG), allowing for greater availability of free testosterone and estradiol, while also supporting joint and bone health.
supplements.indication: Recommended to support hormone balance in patients with elevated SHBG, low free hormone levels, menopausal symptoms, low libido, fatigue, hair thinning, or decreased vitality. In this patient, boron may help improve hormone availability and support overall metabolic, skeletal, and inflammatory health as part of a comprehensive hormone optimization plan.

supplements.name: Aged Garlic Extract Formula
supplements.description: Kyolic Aged Garlic Extract Formula 104 supports cardiovascular health by helping to maintain healthy cholesterol levels and overall heart function. This formula combines aged garlic extract with naturally sourced lecithin for a potent, odorless supplement designed for daily wellness.
supplements.indication: Supports healthy cholesterol levels and promotes overall heart health with the power of aged garlic extract and lecithin.

supplements.name: Berberine
supplements.description: A natural compound derived from plants that supports blood sugar regulation and metabolic health.
supplements.indication: Nature's powerful metabolic optimizer. Known for its ability to support healthy blood sugar levels, improve insulin sensitivity, and promote fat metabolism.

promos.name: Tight-Tone-Tan Promotion
promos.description: Our Tight • Toned • Tan promotional package combines three advanced therapies designed to support body composition, skin quality, recovery, and overall appearance from the inside out.
promos.indication: This protocol includes: Retatrutide, 5-Amina-1MQ,and GHK-CU. Retatrutide is a peptide therapy designed to support weight management and metabolic health by regulating appetite, blood sugar, and energy expenditure. As a “triple agonist,” it activates GLP-1, GIP, and glucagon receptors, offering a more comprehensive approach than traditional weight-loss therapies. It may also help preserve lean muscle mass when combined with adequate protein intake and resistance training. 5-Amino-1MQ is a peptide compound being studied for its ability to support fat metabolism, energy production, and body recomposition by inhibiting the NNMT enzyme, which is linked to fat storage and metabolic efficiency. It may help promote a leaner body composition, reduce stubborn fat, improve muscle definition, and support energy levels, making it a common addition to weight management and metabolic optimization protocols. GHK-Cu is a naturally occurring copper peptide studied for its regenerative, skin, and hair-supportive properties. It may support collagen production, tissue repair, skin firmness and texture, wound healing, antioxidant activity, and overall skin and scalp health.

supplements.name: Iron Bisglycinate
supplements.description: Iron bisglycinate is a highly absorbable form of iron that is chelated to the amino acid glycine, making it gentler on the digestive system than many traditional iron supplements. It is commonly used to support healthy iron levels, red blood cell production, energy, and oxygen transport throughout the body.
supplements.indication: Iron bisglycinate may be recommended for individuals with low iron stores, low ferritin levels, iron deficiency, or symptoms such as fatigue, weakness, hair shedding, or reduced exercise tolerance. It is often used to replenish iron levels while minimizing common gastrointestinal side effects such as constipation, nausea, and stomach upset.

medications.name: Retatrutide
medications.dosing: STK-11: (starter vial); 4 mg; 0.5 ml; 2 ml; 16 mg; STK-13: (titrate vial); 12 mg; 0.5 ml; 2 ml; 48 mg
medications.description: An investigational next-generation metabolic therapy designed to activate three key hormone pathways involved in appetite control, glucose regulation, energy balance, and fat metabolism: GLP-1, GIP, and glucagon. This triple-action mechanism is what makes retatrutide especially exciting compared with earlier incretin therapies. In clinical research, retatrutide has shown substantial weight-loss potential, with higher-dose groups in phase 2 obesity trials averaging up to 24.2% body-weight reduction over 48 weeks. Its broader metabolic signaling may also support meaningful fat-mass reduction while helping clients pursue a more complete body-composition strategy when paired with adequate protein intake, resistance training, and clinician-guided monitoring.
medications.indication: May fit clients seeking advanced metabolic and weight-management support when appetite, cravings, insulin resistance, or body-composition goals have not responded adequately to lifestyle changes or prior GLP-1/GIP therapies. Retatrutide may be especially relevant for clients focused not only on scale weight, but also on improving fat loss while protecting strength, lean tissue, and long-term metabolic health through a structured plan that includes nutrition, resistance training, and follow-up monitoring.

supplements.name: DIM with CDG
supplements.description: DIM with CDG is a comprehensive supplement designed to support healthy estrogen metabolism and detoxification pathways. Diindolylmethane (DIM) helps promote the conversion of estrogen into more favorable metabolites, while Calcium-D-Glucarate (CDG) supports the body's natural detoxification processes by helping reduce the reabsorption of metabolized hormones through the digestive tract. Together, they help maintain hormonal balance and support overall wellness.
supplements.indication: DIM with CDG may be beneficial for individuals seeking support for estrogen balance, particularly those experiencing symptoms associated with estrogen excess or altered estrogen metabolism. It is commonly used as part of a hormone optimization program to support healthy estrogen clearance, breast health, PMS symptoms, menstrual irregularities, and hormone balance in both women and men. Always use under the guidance of a healthcare provider.

tests.name: DUTCH Complete™ Test
tests.description: The DUTCH Complete™ Test (Dried Urine Test for Comprehensive Hormones) is an advanced hormone panel that provides a detailed analysis of sex hormones, adrenal function, and their metabolites. Using dried urine samples collected over a 24-hour period, this test offers a comprehensive assessment of hormonal balance, metabolism, and overall endocrine health. It measures cortisol patterns, sex hormones, melatonin, and organic acid markers to provide insights into stress response, hormone detoxification, and overall well-being.
tests.indication: The DUTCH Complete™ Test is indicated for individuals experiencing symptoms related to hormone imbalance, adrenal dysfunction, and metabolic concerns, including fatigue, mood swings, weight fluctuations, irregular menstrual cycles, low libido, and sleep disturbances. It is particularly beneficial for assessing adrenal health, evaluating estrogen metabolism, and monitoring hormone therapy. This test provides actionable insights for optimizing hormonal balance, improving stress resilience, and enhancing overall wellness.

supplements.name: Myo-Inositol
supplements.description: Myo-inositol is a naturally occurring carbohydrate-like compound that functions as an important cellular messenger involved in insulin signaling, glucose metabolism, neurotransmitter activity, and hormone regulation. It supports healthy communication between cells and plays a key role in metabolic and neurological function.
supplements.indication: Myo-inositol may be beneficial for individuals with elevated fasting glucose, insulin resistance, higher hemoglobin A1C levels, metabolic syndrome, or a family history of diabetes. It is also frequently used to support mood, stress resilience, and nervous system balance, making it a valuable tool for improving both metabolic health and overall well-being.

supplements.name: Glycine
supplements.description: Glycine is a naturally occurring amino acid that serves as a building block for collagen and connective tissue while also supporting neurotransmitter function within the nervous system. It plays an important role in sleep regulation, detoxification pathways, joint health, and the production of glutathione, one of the body's primary antioxidants.
supplements.indication: Glycine is commonly recommended for individuals experiencing poor sleep quality, difficulty recovering from exercise, connective tissue concerns, joint discomfort, or increased oxidative stress. Taken before bedtime, it may help support deeper, more restorative sleep while also contributing to long-term recovery and tissue repair.

supplements.name: Boron
supplements.description: Boron is a trace mineral involved in numerous physiological processes, including hormone metabolism, bone health, vitamin D utilization, cognitive function, and inflammatory regulation. It helps support the body's ability to maintain healthy levels of key hormones and may influence how hormones are transported and utilized throughout the body.
supplements.indication: Boron may be beneficial for individuals with elevated Sex Hormone Binding Globulin (SHBG), low free testosterone, concerns regarding bone density, or those seeking improved hormone optimization and recovery. It is commonly used as part of a comprehensive hormone-support protocol to help improve the availability of biologically active testosterone and support overall wellness.

medications.name: Retatrutide
medications.dosing: STK-11: (starter vial); 4 mg; 0.5 ml; 2 ml; 16 mg; STK-13: (titrate vial); 12 mg; 0.5 ml; 2 ml; 48 mg
medications.description: An investigational next-generation metabolic therapy designed to activate three key hormone pathways involved in appetite control, glucose regulation, energy balance, and fat metabolism: GLP-1, GIP, and glucagon. This triple-action mechanism is what makes retatrutide especially exciting compared with earlier incretin therapies. In clinical research, retatrutide has shown substantial weight-loss potential, with higher-dose groups in phase 2 obesity trials averaging up to 24.2% body-weight reduction over 48 weeks. Its broader metabolic signaling may also support meaningful fat-mass reduction while helping clients pursue a more complete body-composition strategy when paired with adequate protein intake, resistance training, and clinician-guided monitoring.
medications.indication: May fit clients seeking advanced metabolic and weight-management support when appetite, cravings, insulin resistance, or body-composition goals have not responded adequately to lifestyle changes or prior GLP-1/GIP therapies. Retatrutide may be especially relevant for clients focused not only on scale weight, but also on improving fat loss while protecting strength, lean tissue, and long-term metabolic health through a structured plan that includes nutrition, resistance training, and follow-up monitoring.
